title: The Song For Colin
content:
I sang a song at dusking time
Beneath the evening star,
And Terence left his latest rhyme
To answer from afar.

Pierrot laid down his lute to weep,
And sighed, "She sings for me."
But Colin slept a careless sleep
Beneath an apple tree.
meaning:
Sara Teasdale's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Song For Colin"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
